description: Hospitals and clinics — 24/7 critical operations with highest base loads.

behavioral_rules.name: Continuous Critical Base Load
behavioral_rules.description: Healthcare requires near-constant load. Night min should be >60% of day avg.
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Normal pattern — validate backup power covers base critical load.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: 24/7 critical operations confirmed — {value:.0%} base load maintained overnight.

behavioral_rules.name: Shift Change Spike Pattern
behavioral_rules.description: Consumption spikes at 07:00, 15:00, and 23:00 indicate shift changeovers.
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Validate medical equipment activation follows shift handover protocols.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Shift-change energy spikes detected — HVAC pre-conditioning recommended.

efficiency_rules.name: Demand Spike Detection
efficiency_rules.description: Max meter reading exceeds threshold × mean — indicates uncontrolled demand peaks.
efficiency_rules.recommendation: Implement demand response: stagger HVAC start, shift non-critical loads.
efficiency_rules.demo_alert: Peak demand is {value:.1f}x the average — opportunity to flatten load curve.

efficiency_rules.name: Steam/Hot Water Proportion
efficiency_rules.description: Steam for sterilization should be <30% of total energy mix.
efficiency_rules.recommendation: Consider low-energy sterilization alternatives for non-critical equipment.
efficiency_rules.demo_alert: Steam accounts for {value:.0%} of energy mix — above benchmark threshold.

weather_sensitivity_rules.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
weather_sensitivity_rules.description: Correlation between air_temperature and meter_reading reveals cooling/heating dependency.
weather_sensitivity_rules.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.
weather_sensitivity_rules.demo_alert: Energy use is {value:.0%} correlated with outdoor temperature.

weather_sensitivity_rules.name: Humidity Control Load
weather_sensitivity_rules.description: Healthcare requires precise humidity control — correlated with dew_temperature.
weather_sensitivity_rules.recommendation: Pre-emptive dehumidification during forecasted humid days saves reactive load.
weather_sensitivity_rules.demo_alert: Humidity-driven energy load detected — forecast-based HVAC can reduce cost.

alert_rules.name: Unexpected Consumption Drop
alert_rules.description: A sudden >40% drop in consumption vs prior day average is anomalous in healthcare.
alert_rules.recommendation: URGENT: Verify no equipment failure or power supply interruption.
alert_rules.demo_alert: CRITICAL: Consumption dropped {value:.0%} — possible equipment failure or outage!
